name: GraphQL Yoga
description: GraphQL Yoga is a batteries-included cross-platform GraphQL over HTTP spec-compliant GraphQL Server using Envelop and GraphQL Tools that runs anywhere.

one-of.note: Requires the envelop extended validation plugin. [Read more.](https://github.com/graphql-hive/graphql-yoga/blob/main/packages/envelop/plugins/extended-validation/README.md)

defer.note: Requires the defer and stream plugin. [Read more.](https://the-guild.dev/graphql/yoga-server/docs/features/defer-stream)

stream.note: Requires the defer and stream plugin. [Read more.](https://the-guild.dev/graphql/yoga-server/docs/features/defer-stream)

persisted-documents.note: The protocol for persisted documents is still TBD. With the `@graphql-yoga/plugin-persisted-operations` plugin.
